response:
Subject: Appreciation for the Detailed Response  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

I wanted to follow up regarding a potential misunderstanding concerning the current machine vision system. The system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously mentioned.  

Attached to this email, I have included the technical data for reference. Please find the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will review these documents in detail and get back to you with further insights.  

Thank you again for your assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
